title: Muppiym #4649
definition:
Muppim = "serpent"

 1) a Benjamite and one of the 14 descendants of Rachel who belonged
    to the original colony of the sons of Jacob in Egypt
    1a) also 'Shupham'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Muppim = "serpent"

 1) a Benjamite and one of the 14 descendants of Rachel who belonged
    to the original colony of the sons of Jacob in Egypt
    1a) also 'Shupham'

    NASB:  a family in Benjamin
